headline: Kroger expands digital price tags as pricing concerns grow
summary: Kroger is expanding digital shelf labels nationwide, raising concerns they could influence prices as grocery costs remain high.

raw.headline: Kroger expands digital price tags as pricing concerns grow
raw.summary: Kroger is expanding digital shelf labels nationwide, raising concerns they could influence prices as grocery costs remain high.

headline: Will Kroger (KR) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Kroger (KR) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

raw.headline: Will Kroger (KR) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
raw.summary: Kroger (KR) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Is Kroger Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Kroger has lagged the S&P 500 Index over the past year, and analysts remain somewhat bullish on the stock’s growth prospects.

raw.headline: Is Kroger Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
raw.summary: Kroger has lagged the S&P 500 Index over the past year, and analysts remain somewhat bullish on the stock’s growth prospects.

headline: Trucking carriers, Kroger counter allegations of no-hire agreements
summary: A complaint by former unionized Quickway Transportation drivers takes issue with job rejections by three carriers owned by Knight-Swift Transportation Holdings and Werner Enterprises.

raw.headline: Trucking carriers, Kroger counter allegations of no-hire agreements
raw.summary: A complaint by former unionized Quickway Transportation drivers takes issue with job rejections by three carriers owned by Knight-Swift Transportation Holdings and Werner Enterprises.
